I see we're in the cc-haha repository, not the Django repository. The Django issue analysis cannot be performed in this repository. To properly analyze the Django issue about inefficient DELETE queries in the deletion collector, you would need to be in the actual Django repository at https://github.com/django/django.

Would you like me to:
1. Help you navigate to the Django repository, or
2. Analyze a similar issue that might exist in this cc-haha repository, or
3. Provide general guidance on how Django's deletion collector works based on my knowledge?

If you'd like to work with the actual Django codebase, you can clone it with:
```bash
git clone https://github.com/django/django.git
cd django
```
